---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
library(dygraphs)
library(xts)
```

# EXO

## JDR

```{r}
jdr <- read_csv("~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/JDR_exodata_wide_2022_23_final.csv") |>
  rename(siteId = SiteName) |>
  rename_with(~ str_replace_all(.x, "_+", "_")) |>
  rename_with(~ str_replace(.x, "_$", "")) |> 
  complete(TIMESTAMP = seq(min(TIMESTAMP), max(TIMESTAMP), by = "15 min")) |> 
  mutate(
    across(
      Conductivity_uS_cm:Turbidity_NTU,
      ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, x = TIMESTAMP, na.rm = FALSE, maxgap = 2)
    ),
    across(
      contains("flag"),
      ~ zoo::na.locf(.x, na.rm = FALSE, maxgap = 2)
    ),
    across(
      Conductivity_uS_cm:Turbidity_NTU,
      ~ round(.x, 2))
  ) |>
  mutate(datetime_local = force_tz(TIMESTAMP, tzone = "America/Denver"),
         datetime_UTC = with_tz(datetime_local, tzone = "UTC"),
         siteId = "JDR") |> 
  select(-TIMESTAMP) |> 
  filter(!is.na(datetime_UTC))

```

### Dygraph

```{r}
# DO
jdr_clean <- jdr |>
  arrange(datetime_local) |>
  drop_na(ODO_mg_L)

jdr_xts <- xts(jdr_clean$ODO_mg_L, order.by = jdr_clean$datetime_local)

dygraph(jdr_xts, main = "JDR Dissolved Oxygen") |>
  dyOptions(useDataTimezone = TRUE) |> 
  dyAxis("y", label = "ODO (mg/L)") |>
  dyAxis("x",
    axisLabelFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return d.toLocaleString('en-US', {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }"),
    valueFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return new Date(d).toLocaleString('en-US', {
        year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }")
  ) |>
  dyRangeSelector() |> 
  dyCSS(textConnection("
    .dygraph-title { color: black; }
    .dygraph-axis-label { color: black; }
    .dygraph-ylabel { color: black; }
    .dygraph-legend { color: black; }
  "))

# Temp
jdr_clean <- jdr |>
  arrange(datetime_local) |>
  drop_na(Temp_EXO_C)

jdr_xts <- xts(jdr_clean$Temp_EXO_C, order.by = jdr_clean$datetime_local)

dygraph(jdr_xts, main = "JDR Temp") |>
  dyOptions(useDataTimezone = TRUE) |> 
  dyAxis("y", label = "Temperature (C)") |>
  dyAxis("x",
    axisLabelFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return d.toLocaleString('en-US', {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }"),
    valueFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return new Date(d).toLocaleString('en-US', {
        year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }")
  ) |>
  dyRangeSelector() |> 
  dyCSS(textConnection("
    .dygraph-title { color: black; }
    .dygraph-axis-label { color: black; }
    .dygraph-ylabel { color: black; }
    .dygraph-legend { color: black; }
  "))

```

```{r}
jdr_clean <- jdr |>
  select(-contains("Level")) |>
  relocate(datetime_UTC, datetime_local, siteId) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      ends_with("_flag"),
      ~ case_when(
        . == "o" ~ "Z",
        . == "d" ~ "D",
        . == "r" ~ "A",
        . == "q" ~ "B",
        TRUE ~ .
      )
    )
  )
```

### Flag Plots

```{r}
# Define param -> flag mapping
params <- c(
  "Conductivity_uS_cm", "FDOM_QSUraw", "FDOM_QSU_temp",
  "FDOM_QSU_tempturb", "rp", "ODO_mg_L", "ODOSat",
  "SpCond_uS_cm", "Temp_EXO_C", "Turbidity_NTU"
)
flags <- c(
  "Conductivity_uS_cm_flag", "FDOM_QSU_flag", "FDOM_QSU_flag",
  "FDOM_QSU_flag", NA, "ODO_mg_L_flag", "ODOSat_flag",
  "SpCond_uS_cm_flag", "Temp_EXO_C_flag", "Turbidity_NTU_flag"
)

# Build long data frame
make_long <- function(param, flag_col) {
  jdr_clean |>
    transmute(
      datetime_local,
      param = param,
      value = .data[[param]],
      flag = if (!is.na(flag_col)) .data[[flag_col]] else NA_character_
    )
}

long_data <- map2_dfr(params, flags, make_long) |>
  mutate(
    flag_plot = case_when(
      is.na(flag) ~ "NA",
      TRUE ~ flag
    ),
    flag_plot = factor(flag_plot, levels = c("Z", "D", "A", "B", "NA"))
  )

# Value plot
long_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = value, color = flag_plot)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Z" = "#CC79A7",
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "A" = "#009E73",
      "B" = "#F0E442",
      "NA" = "grey60"
    ),
    breaks = c("Z", "D", "A", "B", "NA"),
    labels = c(
      "Z" = "Z-Score",
      "D" = "Dry",
      "A" = "A",
      "B" = "B",
      "NA" = "NA"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = "Flag") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom"
  )

long_flags <- map2_dfr(params, flags, make_long) |>
  mutate(
    flag_plot = case_when(
      is.na(flag) ~ "NA",
      TRUE ~ flag
    ),
    flag_plot = factor(flag_plot, levels = c("Z", "D", "A", "B", "NA"))
  )

long_flags |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = flag_plot, color = flag_plot)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Z" = "#CC79A7",
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "A" = "#009E73",
      "B" = "#F0E442",
      "NA" = "grey60"
    ),
    breaks = c("Z", "D", "A", "B", "NA")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Flag", color = "Flag") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```

```{r}
long_data |> 
  count(param, flag) |> 
  mutate(flag = replace_na(flag, "no_flag")) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = flag, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |> 
  arrange(param)

jdr_clean |> 
  ggplot(aes(Turbidity_NTU, rp)) +
  geom_point()

jdr_clean |> 
  mutate(test = FDOM_QSU_temp/rp) |> 
  select(datetime_UTC, rp, test, FDOM_QSU_tempturb)

turb_coef <- coef(lm(log(rp) ~ Turbidity_NTU, data = jdr_clean))

jdr_clean |> 
  mutate(rp_test = exp(turb_coef[1] + turb_coef[2] * Turbidity_NTU)) |> 
  select(rp, rp_test)

jdr_clean <- jdr_clean |> 
  select(-rp)
```

### AIMS-ify

```{r}
exo_vars <- c("Temp_EXO_C", "ODOSat", "ODO_mg_L", "SpCond_uS_cm",
              "Conductivity_uS_cm", "FDOM_QSU_Raw", "FDOM_QSU_Temp",
              "FDOM_QSU_TempTurb", "Turbidity_NTU")

jdr_aims <- jdr_clean |>
  select(datetime_UTC, datetime_local, any_of(c(params[params != "rp"], flags[!is.na(flags)]))) |>
  rename(
    FDOM_QSU_Raw = FDOM_QSUraw,
    FDOM_QSU_Temp = FDOM_QSU_temp,
    FDOM_QSU_TempTurb = FDOM_QSU_tempturb,
    flag_Conductivity_uS_cm = Conductivity_uS_cm_flag,
    flag_FDOM_QSU = FDOM_QSU_flag,
    flag_ODO_mg_L = ODO_mg_L_flag,
    flag_ODOSat = ODOSat_flag,
    flag_SpCond_uS_cm = SpCond_uS_cm_flag,
    flag_Temp_EXO_C = Temp_EXO_C_flag,
    flag_Turbidity_NTU = Turbidity_NTU_flag
  ) |> 
    mutate(
    project = "AIMS",
    rType = "EXOS",
    siteId = "JSS01",
    appr1 = 1,
    appr2 = 0,
    appr3 = 0,
    appr4 = 0,
    sublocation = "SW"
  ) |>
  filter(row_number() <= max(which(if_any(all_of(exo_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))))) |> 
  mutate(year = year(datetime_UTC)) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  mutate(
    rep = {
      non_na_rows <- if_any(all_of(exo_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))
      first_day <- min(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      last_day <- max(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      paste0(format(first_day, "%Y%m%d"), "-", format(last_day, "%Y%m%d"))
    }
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-year) |>
  relocate(
    project,
    datetime_UTC,
    datetime_local,
    siteId,
    rType,
    appr1,
    appr2,
    appr3,
    appr4,
    rep,
    sublocation
  )


jdr_aims |> janitor::get_dupes()

jdr_aims |>
  mutate(year = year(datetime_UTC)) |>
  filter(!is.na(year)) |>
  mutate(
    datetime_UTC = format(datetime_UTC, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC"),
    datetime_local = format(datetime_local, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  ) |> 
  group_by(year) |>
  group_walk(~ write_csv(.x, paste0("~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/Processed/JDR/EXOS_MW_JDR_JSS01_SW_", .y$year, ".csv")))
```

## GBJ

```{r}
gbj <- read_csv("~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/GBJ_exodata_wide_2022_24_final.csv") |>
  rename(flag = `...17`) |>
  rename_with(~ str_replace_all(.x, "_+", "_")) |> # Collapse repeated underscores
  rename_with(~ str_replace_all(.x, "[._]+$", "")) |> # Remove trailing underscores or dots
  complete(TIMESTAMP = seq(min(TIMESTAMP), max(TIMESTAMP), by = "15 min")) |> 
    mutate(
    across(
      Temp_EXO_C:Turbidity_NTU,
      ~ zoo::na.approx(.x, x = TIMESTAMP, na.rm = FALSE, maxgap = 2)
    ),
    across(
      alphaQf:dry_flag,
      ~ zoo::na.locf(.x, na.rm = FALSE, maxgap = 2)
    ),
    across(
      c(Temp_EXO_C, ODOSat, ODO_mg_L, SpCond_uS_cm, Conductivity_uS_cm, FDOM_QSUraw, Turbidity_NTU),
      ~ round(.x, 2))
  ) |> 
  mutate(datetime_local = force_tz(TIMESTAMP, tzone = "America/Denver"),
         datetime_UTC = with_tz(datetime_local, tzone = "UTC")) |> 
  select(-c(TIMESTAMP, ODO_MiniDOT_mg_L, ODOSat_MiniDOT, flag, wetQf)) |> 
  relocate(datetime_UTC, datetime_local) |> 
  filter(!is.na(datetime_UTC))
```

### Dygraph

```{r}
# DO
gbj_clean <- gbj |>
  arrange(datetime_local) |>
  drop_na(ODO_mg_L)

gbj_xts <- xts(gbj_clean$ODO_mg_L, order.by = gbj_clean$datetime_local)

dygraph(gbj_xts, main = "GBJ Dissolved Oxygen") |>
  dyOptions(useDataTimezone = TRUE) |> 
  dyAxis("y", label = "ODO (mg/L)") |>
  dyAxis("x",
    axisLabelFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return d.toLocaleString('en-US', {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }"),
    valueFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return new Date(d).toLocaleString('en-US', {
        year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }")
  ) |>
  dyRangeSelector() |> 
  dyCSS(textConnection("
    .dygraph-title { color: black; }
    .dygraph-axis-label { color: black; }
    .dygraph-ylabel { color: black; }
    .dygraph-legend { color: black; }
  "))

# Temp
gbj_clean <- gbj |>
  arrange(datetime_local) |>
  drop_na(Temp_EXO_C)

gbj_xts <- xts(gbj_clean$Temp_EXO_C, order.by = gbj_clean$datetime_local)

dygraph(jdr_xts, main = "GBJ Temp") |>
  dyOptions(useDataTimezone = TRUE) |> 
  dyAxis("y", label = "Temperature (C)") |>
  dyAxis("x",
    axisLabelFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return d.toLocaleString('en-US', {
        month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }"),
    valueFormatter = htmlwidgets::JS("function(d) {
      return new Date(d).toLocaleString('en-US', {
        year: 'numeric', month: 'short', day: 'numeric',
        hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit',
        hour12: false
      });
    }")
  ) |>
  dyRangeSelector() |> 
  dyCSS(textConnection("
    .dygraph-title { color: black; }
    .dygraph-axis-label { color: black; }
    .dygraph-ylabel { color: black; }
    .dygraph-legend { color: black; }
  "))

```

### Flag Plots

```{r}
gbj <- gbj |>
  relocate(datetime_UTC, datetime_local)

# Parameters to plot
params <- c(
  "Conductivity_uS_cm", "FDOM_QSUraw", "FDOM_QSU_temp",
  "FDOM_QSU_tempturb", "ODO_mg_L", "ODOSat",
  "SpCond_uS_cm", "Temp_EXO_C", "Turbidity_NTU"
)

# Build long data frame using shared GBJ flags
make_long <- function(param) {
  gbj |>
    transmute(
      datetime_local,
      param = param,
      value = .data[[param]],
      flag = case_when(
        dry_flag == 1 ~ "D",
        alphaQf == 1 ~ "alpha",
        betaQfSd == 1 ~ "beta",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    )
}

long_data <- map_dfr(params, make_long) |>
  mutate(
    flag_plot = case_when(
      is.na(flag) ~ "NA",
      TRUE ~ flag
    ),
    flag_plot = factor(flag_plot, levels = c("D", "alpha", "beta", "NA"))
  )

# Value plot
long_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = value, color = flag_plot)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "alpha" = "#009E73",
      "beta" = "#F0E442",
      "NA" = "grey60"
    ),
    breaks = c("D", "alpha", "beta", "NA"),
    labels = c(
      "D" = "Dry",
      "alpha" = "alphaQf",
      "beta" = "betaQfSd",
      "NA" = "NA"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = "") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

# Flag-only timeline plot
long_flags <- map_dfr(params, make_long) |>
  mutate(
    flag_plot = case_when(
      is.na(flag) ~ "NA",
      TRUE ~ flag
    ),
    flag_plot = factor(flag_plot, levels = c("D", "alpha", "beta", "NA"))
  )

long_flags |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = flag_plot, color = flag_plot)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7, alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "alpha" = "#009E73",
      "beta" = "#F0E442",
      "NA" = "grey60"
    ),
    breaks = c("D", "alpha", "beta", "NA")
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Flag", color = "") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

### Fix Flags

```{r}
exo_vars <- c("Temp_EXO_C", "ODOSat", "ODO_mg_L", "SpCond_uS_cm",
              "Conductivity_uS_cm", "FDOM_QSUraw", "FDOM_QSU_temp",
              "FDOM_QSU_tempturb", "Turbidity_NTU")

gbj_clean <- gbj |>
  mutate(
    dry_flag = if_else(
      year(datetime_local) == 2022 & month(datetime_local) == 12 |
      year(datetime_local) == 2023 & month(datetime_local) == 1,
      1, dry_flag
    ),
    alphaQf = if_else(
      year(datetime_local) == 2022 & month(datetime_local) == 12 |
      year(datetime_local) == 2023 & month(datetime_local) == 1,
      0, alphaQf
    ),
    betaQfSd = if_else(
      year(datetime_local) == 2022 & month(datetime_local) == 12 |
      year(datetime_local) == 2023 & month(datetime_local) == 1,
      0, betaQfSd
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(
    across(
      all_of(exo_vars),
      \(x) case_when(
        is.na(x) & is.na(dry_flag) & is.na(alphaQf) & is.na(betaQfSd) ~ "M",
        replace_na(dry_flag, 0) == 1 ~ "D",
        replace_na(alphaQf, 0) == 1 ~ "A",
        replace_na(betaQfSd, 0) == 1 ~ "B",
        is.na(x) ~ "M",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      .names = "flag_{.col}"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
make_long <- function(param) {
  gbj_clean |>
    transmute(
      datetime_local,
      param = param,
      value = .data[[param]],
      flag = .data[[paste0("flag_", param)]]
    )
}

long_flags <- map_dfr(exo_vars, make_long) |>
  mutate(flag = if_else(flag == "", "none", flag)) |>
  mutate(individual_flag = str_split(flag, "")) |>
  unnest(individual_flag) |>
  mutate(
    individual_flag = factor(individual_flag, levels = c("D", "A", "B", "M", "none"))
  )

long_flags |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = individual_flag, color = individual_flag)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "A" = "#009E73",
      "B" = "#F0E442",
      "M" = "#CC79A7",
      "none" = "grey60"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Flag", color = "Flag") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

long_data <- map_dfr(params, make_long) |>
  mutate(
    color_flag = case_when(
      str_detect(flag, "D") ~ "D",
      str_detect(flag, "A") ~ "A",
      str_detect(flag, "B") ~ "B",
      str_detect(flag, "M") ~ "M",
      TRUE ~ "none"
    ),
    color_flag = factor(color_flag, levels = c("D", "A", "B", "M", "none"))
  )

long_data |>
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_local, y = value, color = color_flag)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) +
  facet_wrap(~ param, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "D" = "#E69F00",
      "A" = "#009E73",
      "B" = "#F0E442",
      "M" = "#CC79A7",
      "none" = "grey60"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "D" = "Dry",
      "A" = "alphaQf",
      "B" = "betaQfSd",
      "M" = "Missing",
      "none" = "None"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, color = "") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 11) +
  theme(
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

### AIMS-ify

```{r}
exo_vars <- c("Temp_EXO_C", "ODOSat", "ODO_mg_L", "SpCond_uS_cm",
              "Conductivity_uS_cm", "FDOM_QSU_Raw", "FDOM_QSU_Temp",
              "FDOM_QSU_TempTurb", "Turbidity_NTU")

gbj_aims <- gbj_clean |>
  rename(
    FDOM_QSU_Raw = FDOM_QSUraw,
    FDOM_QSU_Temp = FDOM_QSU_temp,
    FDOM_QSU_TempTurb = FDOM_QSU_tempturb,
    flag_FDOM_QSU = flag_FDOM_QSUraw,
    flag_FDOM_QSU_Temp = flag_FDOM_QSU_temp,
    flag_FDOM_QSU_TempTurb = flag_FDOM_QSU_tempturb
  ) |> 
  select(-c(alphaQf, betaQfSd, dry_flag)) |>
  mutate(
    project = "AIMS",
    rType = "EXOS",
    siteId = "GSS01",
    appr1 = 1,
    appr2 = 0,
    appr3 = 0,
    appr4 = 0,
    sublocation = "SW"
  ) |>
  filter(row_number() <= max(which(if_any(all_of(exo_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))))) |> 
  mutate(year = year(datetime_UTC)) |>
  group_by(year) |>
  mutate(
    rep = {
      non_na_rows <- if_any(all_of(exo_vars), ~ !is.na(.x))
      first_day <- min(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      last_day <- max(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      paste0(format(first_day, "%Y%m%d"), "-", format(last_day, "%Y%m%d"))
    }
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-year) |>
  relocate(
    project,
    datetime_UTC,
    datetime_local,
    siteId,
    rType,
    appr1,
    appr2,
    appr3,
    appr4,
    rep,
    sublocation
  )

gbj_aims |> janitor::get_dupes()

gbj_aims |>
  mutate(year = year(datetime_UTC)) |>
  filter(!is.na(year)) |>
  mutate(
    datetime_UTC = format(datetime_UTC, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC"),
    datetime_local = format(datetime_local, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
  ) |> 
  group_by(year) |>
  group_walk(~ write_csv(.x, paste0("~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/Processed/GBJ/EXOS_MW_GBJ_GSS01_SW_", .y$year, ".csv")))
```

# Discharge

## Get Dry Flags From Exo

```{r}
gbj_dry <- gbj_aims |>
  filter(
    if_any(starts_with("flag_"), ~ . == "D")
  ) |>
  select(datetime_UTC, siteId)
  

jdr_dry <- jdr_aims |>
  filter(
    if_any(starts_with("flag_"), ~ . == "D")
  ) |>
  select(datetime_UTC, siteId)

mw_dry <- rbind(gbj_dry, jdr_dry)
```

```{r}
mw_q <- read_csv("~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/Qstage_21to24_all.csv") |>
  mutate(datetime_MST = as.POSIXct(DateTime, format = "%d%b%Y %I:%M:%S %p", tz = "MST")) |>
  group_by(site) |>
  complete(datetime_MST = seq(min(datetime_MST), max(datetime_MST), by = "15 min")) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(datetime_UTC = with_tz(datetime_MST, tz = "UTC")) |> 
  rename(Q_Ls = Q, siteId = site) |> 
  mutate(waterDepth_m_SW = FS_stage/100) |> 
  select(-c(DateTime, FS_stage))


mw_q |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_MST, y = Q_Ls)) +
  see::geom_point2(alpha = 0.2, size = 1.5) +
  theme_few() +
  facet_wrap(~siteId, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Discharge (L/s)",
  ) 
mw_q |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = datetime_MST, y = waterDepth_m_SW)) +
  see::geom_point2(alpha = 0.2, size = 1.5) +
  theme_few() +
  facet_wrap(~siteId, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = "Stage (m)",
  )
```

```{r}
mw_q_aims <- mw_q |>
  mutate(
    project = "AIMS",
    rType = "DISC",
    appr1 = 1,
    appr2 = 0,
    appr3 = 0,
    appr4 = 0,
    sublocation = "SW"
    ) |>
  filter(
    row_number() <= max(which(if_any(c(Q_Ls, waterDepth_m_SW), ~ !is.na(.x))))
  ) |>
  mutate(year = lubridate::year(datetime_UTC)) |>
  group_by(year, siteId) |>
  mutate(
    rep = {
      non_na_rows <- if_any(c(Q_Ls, waterDepth_m_SW), ~ !is.na(.x))
      first_day <- min(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      last_day <- max(datetime_UTC[non_na_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
      paste0(format(first_day, "%Y%m%d"), "-", format(last_day, "%Y%m%d"))
    }
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-year) |>
  relocate(
    project,
    datetime_UTC,
    datetime_MST,
    siteId,
    rType,
    appr1,
    appr2,
    appr3,
    appr4,
    rep,
    sublocation
  )


base_dir <- "~/Desktop/MW_EXO_QAQC/Processed/Q"

mw_q_aims |>
  mutate(
    year = lubridate::year(datetime_UTC),
    watershed = case_when(
      siteId == "JSS01" ~ "JDR",
      siteId == "DSS01" ~ "DRC",
      siteId == "GSS01" ~ "GBJ",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(watershed)) |>
  mutate(
    datetime_UTC = format(datetime_UTC, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "UTC"),
    datetime_MST = format(datetime_MST, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S", tz = "MST")
  ) |> 
  group_by(watershed, siteId, year) |>
  group_walk(\(df, key) {
    
    folder <- file.path(base_dir, key$watershed)
    
    fname <- paste0(
      "DISC_MW_",
      key$watershed,
      "_",
      key$siteId,
      "_SW_",
      key$year,
      ".csv"
    )
    
    full_path <- file.path(folder, fname)
    
    write_csv(df, file = full_path)
  })
```
